content:
## Flashcards

### Focus topics
- flashcards

### Source-grounded notes
- Classification of Fire: Classes A, B, C and D of fire, Means of extinguishing various classes of fire.
- UNIT-II 8 Hours Fire Safety Laws: Provisions in Factories Act, Explosives act, Petroleum act with regard to precautions in case of fire.
- Fire Prevention and Detection: Fire safety precautions, Escape means, Electrical installations, Ventilation systems, Fire detection systems, Types of Detectors, Selection of Fire Detectors and Page 31 of 34

_LLM generation is currently unavailable, so these notes use cleaned retrieved context only._
